---
title: Design Framework for Metasurface Optics-based Convolutional Neural Networks
author:
- Carlos Mauricio Villegas Burgos
- Tianqi Yang
- Nick Vamivakas
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ao21-msonn.pdf
supp_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/ao21-msonn-supp.pdf
journ: Applied Optics
year: 2021
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 49
---
